game.title: Retro Snake
game.description: Open a classic arcade snake game.

doudizhu.title: Dou Dizhu Table
doudizhu.description: Open a polished single-player Dou Dizhu practice table.

game.title: Retro Snake
game.subtitle: Minimal classic loop: eat fruits to grow, and avoid walls or your own tail.
game.controls: Controls: Arrow keys / WASD move, Space pauses/resumes, P pauses.
game.hint: Press Space to start. Higher score means higher speed.

doudizhu.title: Dou Dizhu Table
doudizhu.subtitle: A more authentic Dou Dizhu practice table with bidding, landlord assignment, a shared play area, and client-style table feedback.
doudizhu.controls: Controls: click cards to select, Enter to play, Space to pass, Backspace to clear.
doudizhu.hint: Select a legal combo and beat the current table, or pass when you cannot.
doudizhu.tableOpen: No active trick. The lead can play any legal combo.
doudizhu.invalidCombo: That card set is not a supported combo yet.
doudizhu.mustBeat: Your play must beat the current trick.
doudizhu.cannotPass: You cannot pass when the table is open.

about.title: About This Project
about.body: This navigation app is built with Next.js App Router, next-intl, and next-themes, and is suitable for Cloudflare Pages deployment.
